headline: Rokt Named to Fortune Best Workplaces in New York™ 2026
summary: Rokt, the leading ecommerce technology company using machine learning and AI to make the shopping experience more relevant to each customer, has been named to the 2026 Fortune Best Workplaces in New York™ list, ranking No. 24 in the small and medium category. The recognition, determined by Great Place To Work® through confidential employee surveys, reflects Rokt's commitment to building a high-performing culture where accountability and flexibility reinforce each other.

headline: Ulta’s Times Square Flagship Tests Experiential Retail And Digital Ambitions
summary: Ulta Beauty (NasdaqGS:ULTA) plans to open a four story flagship store in New York City's Times Square, featuring an immersive and experiential retail format. The company is targeting younger consumers and tourists through technology, brand activations, and entertainment in the new location. Ulta is also expanding its digital presence with reported double digit ecommerce sales growth, AI driven personalization, and activity on platforms such as TikTok Shop. Ulta Beauty operates a nationwide...
